_comment: GRADUATION PASS-BAR — locked by Brain (blind, pre-run) 2026-06-26 via CEO relay. Do NOT change after seeing any scored results; changing it post-hoc recreates the circularity the gold-recall retraction fixed. This file is the integrity artifact for Gate-2.
amendedBy: Brain cards 64/66/68 + CEO carve-out-kill confirm (2026-06-26, PRE-SCORED) — see _BAR-CHANGE-LOG.md '2026-06-26 — Carve-out KILLED + #4/#5 reclassified' entry for before-state + attestation

hardFail_anyOne: fabrication: any raised clause absent from source
decoy_misfire: absent decoy raised at all, OR any decoy raised as disqualifying
concept_presence_miss: any mustRaise:true concept (token OR alias) not surfaced ANYWHERE in the engine's analysis output (raised gates + cites + judge rationale + dissent + verifier claims)
advisory_logOnly_doNotBlock: disposition_mismatch: mustRaise concept surfaced but not at the key's expected disposition (REVISED to advisory 2026-06-26 — null-bidder met≠unmet semantics + gate-naming non-determinism)
acquisitionPart mismatch (classifier tuning, not a safety failure)

graduationBar_across5.minimumPass: ALL in-scope full_verdict pass (ZERO-miss) AND all oos_detection fire (ZERO-miss) — NO carve-out
graduationBar_across5.note: Carve-out KILLED (CEO confirmed). Graduation = every in-scope full_verdict key passes (#1 CAUTION, #2 BID, #3 INELIGIBLE, #4 CAUTION-services) AND the oos_detection set honest-fails OUT_OF_SCOPE (#5 construction). #5 reclassified from a bond-inversion verdict key to construction oos_detection; #4 restored as an in-scope services CAUTION key (refills the pole #5 vacated). Pre-scored amendment — see _BAR-CHANGE-LOG.md for before-state + attestation.
graduationBar_across5.supersedes_note: Prior bar was '4 of 5, mustPass {#2,#3,#5}, carveOut {#1,#4}'. The old '#5 bond-inversion MUST pass' expectation is VOID (#5 is construction → oos_detection).

scorerAlignmentNote: Brain Option A (2026-06-26): scoreJudgment now hard-fails named gates on CONCEPT-PRESENCE (jr.namedGates[].surfaced) — disposition is advisory (jr.dispositionAdvisories). jr.failures already excludes disposition + (in the report filter) PART + show-stopper. Hard bar = fabrication + decoy + verdict + concept-presence miss. Keys re-frozen at schemaVersion 0.3-concept-presence (judgment content unchanged; mechanical bump only — Code did not re-author).
